reasoning: Panel 2-of-2 override of the live confirm, which cited only the top-level call order and missed the nested throw. serializeAdapterCommand validates first (src/utils/type-guards.ts:138) but validateAdapterCommand builds its error via JSON.stringify(details) at :68, where details.receivedValue contains the BigInt — JSON.stringify throws TypeError 'Do not know how to serialize a BigInt' before validation's own error can surface. The comment at type-guards.test.ts:432 is behaviorally accurate and the assertion at :433-434 passes proving it; a wrong comment would fail the test with 'Invalid adapter command from serialization'.
